name: malicious-packages-test-repo-transitive
description: Validates MR 16145 (BCE-59685): per-root finding fan-out for transitive malicious deps. Two synthetic non-malicious wrapper packages (mal-wrapper-a, mal-wrapper-b) each pull in the same malicious leaf (clickpy@1.0.1) as a transitive. Expected: two findings emitted for clickpy, one per root, each with dependencyType=TRANSITIVE and root_package_name=mal-wrapper-{a,b}. Also includes one direct malicious (secdriven) as a control — expected: one finding with dependencyType=DIRECT and root_package_name=secdriven.
